report_name: IBM Executive Tom Parker Reportedly a Top Candidate for CISA Director

identities.name: Tom Parker
identities.description: A security services lead at IBM who has emerged as a frontrunner for the director position at CISA.

identities.name: IBM
identities.description: The current employer of Tom Parker, a potential candidate for CISA director.

identities.name: U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA)
identities.description: The U.S. government agency for which Tom Parker is a leading candidate for the director position.

identities.name: Markwayne Mullin
identities.description: The Homeland Security Secretary who reportedly favors a candidate with a private-sector background for the CISA director role.

identities.description: A cyber solutions firm founded by Tom Parker.

identities.description: A cybersecurity conference where Tom Parker is a regular speaker.

identities.description: An organization that recognized Tom Parker as a technology pioneer.

identities.description: The U.S. government department that CISA is a part of, led by Secretary Markwayne Mullin.

identities.description: The national government whose cybersecurity strategy would be influenced by the new CISA director.

identities.description: The legislative body responsible for confirming the CISA Director nominee.
